summary: The DNS query pool divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in polling loop control; no DNS query scheduling or result delivery behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 128: M	crates/net/dns/src/query.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to Poll::Ready, labelled continue, break, and Poll::Pending expressions.
No rate-limit tick, active query enqueueing, queued outcome drain, query advancement, or pending-state behavior changed.
